issue.title: www.sparkchess.com

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Ads) [https://www.sparkchess.com/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.sparkchess.com%2F) ### Comment > Adguard fails to block ads. There's a floating ad below and ad banners on the side, which AdGuard fails to block. To make things worse, note the greyed-out square on the chessboard. User can't move any pieces to that grayed-out square. Somehow, it only happens when AdGuard is on. ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/9cnl8m2prgw8goo884cwo0gckkk00ww11oaac2htg6.jpg?nc=1)
### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard Browser Extension v5.4.3.37 MV3 System version: | `Windows 11` Browser: | Chrome Filters: | **Ad Blocking:**
AdGuard Base filter

**Other:**
Filter unblocking search ads and self-promotion Filters last update: | 2026-06-03T09:02:00Z Other extensions used: | `None of these. ` ### Issue configuration [Import](https://reports.adguard.com/settings/import.html?scheme_version=4&product_type=ext&product_version=5.4.3.37&system_version=Windows+11&ext.manifest_version=3&browser=chrome&regular_filters=2%2C10&filters_last_update=2026-06-03T09%3A02%3A00Z&stealth.enabled=0)

comment.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://www.sparkchess.com/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.sparkchess.com%2F) ### Comment > Note the grayed-out square (G6) on the chessboard. Somehow, when AdGuard is on, this square is grayed out, it's impossible for a player to move any pieces to it. Again, the problem only exists when AdGuard is on. ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/syacdfkwle8cs88kogs4g4gssw04884jcvr5g4wi74.png?nc=1)
Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/2z7nkwu1tr6s4cskcw00wo4888cwscgzloimofe144.png?nc=1)
### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard Browser Extension v5.4.3.37 MV3 System version: | `Windows 11` Browser: | Chrome Filters: | **Ad Blocking:**
AdGuard Base filter

**Other:**
Filter unblocking search ads and self-promotion Filters last update: | 2026-06-03T09:02:00Z Other extensions used: | `None of these. ` ### Issue configuration [Import](https://reports.adguard.com/settings/import.html?scheme_version=4&product_type=ext&product_version=5.4.3.37&system_version=Windows+11&ext.manifest_version=3&browser=chrome&regular_filters=2%2C10&filters_last_update=2026-06-03T09%3A02%3A00Z&stealth.enabled=0)
